languages.text: "Да, еще как. Мне удалось пронести сюда флотскую фраг-гранату — я же знаю, иначе алого жреца не возьмешь. Шестеренка уже вряд ли встанет, а этот..." {n}Женщина бросает короткий взгляд на вивисектора.{/n} "Этому верткому червю повезло, что блюстители сработали быстро и оттянули огонь на себя. Но скоро его везение закончится".

"Yeah, you bet I did. I managed to sneak a naval frag grenade in here — I knew I couldn't take the crimson priest without it. I doubt the cog's going to get up again, and this one..." {n}The woman casts a brief glance at the Vivisector.{/n} "This wriggling worm was lucky that the enforcers reacted quickly and drew the fire back on themselves. But his luck will run out soon enough."

Но скоро его везение закончится".

But his luck will run out soon enough."

languages.text: 「ああ、確かにそうだった。海軍のフラググレネードをこっそり持ち込んだんだ。この赤い司祭を倒すには、これが必要だった。歯車もまた起き上がらないだろう。そしてこの…」{n}女は短くヴィジセクターを見つめる。{/n}「この這い回る虫は、執事たちが素早く反応して、火力を自分たちに引き寄せたおかげで幸運だった。だが、彼の幸運はすぐに尽きるだろう」
languages.original_text: "Yeah, you bet I did. I managed to sneak a naval frag grenade in here — I knew I couldn't take the crimson priest without it. I doubt the cog's going to get up again, and this one..." {n}The woman casts a brief glance at the Vivisector.{/n} "This wriggling worm was lucky that the enforcers reacted quickly and drew the fire back on themselves. But his luck will run out soon enough."

traits.locale_text: 「ああ、確かにそうだった。海軍のフラググレネードをこっそり持ち込んだんだ。この赤い司祭を倒すには、これが必要だった。歯車もまた起き上がらないだろう。そしてこの…」{n}女は短くヴィジセクターを見つめる。{/n}「この這い回る虫は、執事たちが素早く反応して、火力を自分たちに引き寄せたおかげで幸運だった。だが、彼の幸運はすぐに尽きるだろう。」

languages.text: "Evet, kesinlikle. Buraya bir donanma parça tesirli bombası sokmayı başardım. Onsuz kızıl rahibi alt edemeyeceğimi biliyordum. Dişlinin bir daha ayağa kalkacağını sanmam. Bir de bu..." {n}Kadın, Dirikesimci'ye kısa bir bakış atıyor.{/n} "Bu kıvranan solucan, infazcılar hızlı tepki verip ateşi üzerlerine çektiği için şanslıydı. Fakat şansı tükenmek üzere."
languages.original_text: "Yeah, you bet I did. I managed to sneak a naval frag grenade in here — I knew I couldn't take the crimson priest without it. I doubt the cog's going to get up again, and this one..." {n}The woman casts a brief glance at the Vivisector.{/n} "This wriggling worm was lucky that the enforcers reacted quickly and drew the fire back on themselves. But his luck will run out soon enough."

traits.locale_text: "Evet, kesinlikle. Buraya bir donanma parça tesirli bombası sokmayı başardım. Onsuz kızıl rahibi alt edemeyeceğimi biliyordum. Dişlinin bir daha ayağa kalkacağını sanmam. Bir de bu..." {n}Kadın, Dirikesimci'ye kısa bir bakış atıyor.{/n} "Bu kıvranan solucan, infazcılar hızlı tepki verip ateşi üzerlerine çektiği için şanslıydı. Fakat şansı tükenmek üzere."

languages.text: «Pues claro que sí. Conseguí colar una granada frag naval; sabía que no podría deshacerme del sacerdote rojo sin ella. Dudo que ese trasto vuelva a levantarse, y, en cuanto a este...». {n}La mujer lanza una breve mirada al vivisector.{/n} «Este gusano ha tenido suerte de que los guardias reaccionaran rápido y atrajeran mis disparos, pero hasta aquí ha llegado».
languages.original_text: "Yeah, you bet I did. I managed to sneak a naval frag grenade in here — I knew I couldn't take the crimson priest without it. I doubt the cog's going to get up again, and this one..." {n}The woman casts a brief glance at the Vivisector.{/n} "This wriggling worm was lucky that the enforcers reacted quickly and drew the fire back on themselves. But his luck will run out soon enough."

Dudo que ese trasto vuelva a levantarse, y, en cuanto a este...». {n}La mujer lanza una breve mirada al vivisector.{/n} «Este gusano ha tenido suerte de que los guardias reaccionaran rápido y atrajeran mis disparos, pero hasta aquí ha llegado».

languages.text: “没错。我设法把一颗海军破片手雷偷带了进来。我很清楚，没有它我根本搞不定那个红衣神甫。我看那齿轮小子是别想再爬起来了，至于这位……”{n}女人瞥了一眼解剖者。{/n}“算这条蠕虫走运，执法者反应快，替他吸引了火力。但他的好运也马上到头了。”
languages.original_text: "Yeah, you bet I did. I managed to sneak a naval frag grenade in here — I knew I couldn't take the crimson priest without it. I doubt the cog's going to get up again, and this one..." {n}The woman casts a brief glance at the Vivisector.{/n} "This wriggling worm was lucky that the enforcers reacted quickly and drew the fire back on themselves. But his luck will run out soon enough."

traits.locale_text: “没错。我设法把一颗海军破片手雷偷带了进来。我很清楚，没有它我根本搞不定那个红衣神甫。我看那齿轮小子是别想再爬起来了，至于这位……”{n}女人瞥了一眼解剖者。{/n}“算这条蠕虫走运，执法者反应快，替他吸引了火力。但他的好运也马上到头了。”

languages.text: « Oh que oui. J'ai réussi à m'introduire dans l'infirmerie avec une grenade à fragmentation navale, sachant qu'il n'en faudrait pas moins pour tuer le prêtre écarlate. Je doute que ce tas de boulons se relève. Quant à celui-ci... {n}dit-elle en jetant un coup d'œil au vivisecteur,{/n} ce vermisseau a eu de la chance que les prévôts réagissent rapidement et m'obligent à leur tirer dessus. Mais sa chance ne va pas tarder à tourner. »
languages.original_text: "Yeah, you bet I did. I managed to sneak a naval frag grenade in here — I knew I couldn't take the crimson priest without it. I doubt the cog's going to get up again, and this one..." {n}The woman casts a brief glance at the Vivisector.{/n} "This wriggling worm was lucky that the enforcers reacted quickly and drew the fire back on themselves. But his luck will run out soon enough."

traits.locale_text: « Oh que oui. J'ai réussi à m'introduire dans l'infirmerie avec une grenade à fragmentation navale, sachant qu'il n'en faudrait pas moins pour tuer le prêtre écarlate. Je doute que ce tas de boulons se relève. Quant à celui-ci... {n}dit-elle en jetant un coup d'œil au vivisecteur,{/n} ce vermisseau a eu de la chance que les prévôts réagissent rapidement et m'obligent à leur tirer dessus. Mais sa chance ne va pas tarder à tourner. »

languages.text: "Ja, darauf könnt Ihr wetten. Ich konnte eine Fragmentgranate der Flotte hier reinschmuggeln – ich wusste, dass ich den roten Priester sonst nicht erledigen konnte. Ich glaube nicht, dass dieser Scherge noch mal aufsteht, und er hier ..." {n}Die Frau wirft einen kurzen Blick auf den Vivisektor.{/n} "Dieser Wurm hatte Glück, dass die Enforcer schnell reagierten und den Beschuss auf sich selbst lenkten. Aber sein Glück wird ihn als verlassen."
languages.original_text: "Yeah, you bet I did. I managed to sneak a naval frag grenade in here — I knew I couldn't take the crimson priest without it. I doubt the cog's going to get up again, and this one..." {n}The woman casts a brief glance at the Vivisector.{/n} "This wriggling worm was lucky that the enforcers reacted quickly and drew the fire back on themselves. But his luck will run out soon enough."
